text:
Created attachment 202929
scrot.diff

Scrot's developer called it quits and the Debian project has taking over development over here. https://salsa.debian.org/debian/scrot

They have done several bug fix releases since taking it over, just updating the port to use their latest release.

https://salsa.debian.org/debian/scrot/blob/debian/master/ChangeLog
